evals.name: codebase-search-route-b
evals.prompt: Where's the modulestore migration command in the sumac-setup repo, and what other management commands live in the same directory? Give me the file path and the list.
evals.expected_output: Delegates to opencode (explore agent, deepseek). Returns the path sumac-setup/src/edlysaas-data-migrations/edlysaas_data_migrations/management/commands/migrate_modulestore.py and a list of sibling commands. Lean structured answer, not a token-heavy dump.

evals.name: code-review-route-a
evals.prompt: Review the most recent commit in the ai-agent-skills repo (~/Documents/workspace/ai-agent-skills) and tell me if there are any issues.
evals.expected_output: Delegates via the /review command (Route A) against commit HEAD in that repo. Returns a concise review verdict, not the raw diff echoed back.

evals.name: multi-file-compare-route-ce
evals.prompt: Compare migrate_modulestore.py and migrate_credentials_tenant_data.py in the sumac-setup data-migrations commands dir — what do they share and where do they differ?
evals.expected_output: Delegates a multi-file analysis (general/build agent). Returns a tight comparison (shared structure, differing logic) under the structured-answer format.
